recommendations.title: Cherry Falls
recommendations.overview: When students in the small town of Cherry Falls learn a serial killer is targeting virgins, they realize their only chance of survival is to throw a “Pop Your Cherry” party.

recommendations.title: Planet Terror
recommendations.overview: Two doctors find their graveyard shift inundated with townspeople ravaged by sores. Among the wounded is Cherry Darling, a dancer whose leg was ripped from her body. As the invalids quickly become enraged aggressors, Cherry and her ex-boyfriend El Wr

recommendations.title: Far Far Away Idol
recommendations.overview: Shrek, Fiona, Donkey, Puss in Boots, and the rest of the Far Far Away Kingdom battle it out in a singing competition.

recommendations.title: Walking Out
recommendations.overview: A city teen travels to Montana to go hunting with his estranged father, only for the strained trip to become a battle for survival when they encounter a grizzly bear.

recommendations.title: Megamind: The Button of Doom
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: For their first day on the job as the new protectors of Metro City, Megamind and Minion are selling off the gadgets from their evil lair. But when one seemingly harmless "button" unleashes the gigantic robot MEGA-MEGAmind, the duo will have to resort

recommendations.title: Lupin the Third vs. Detective Conan: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Conan Edogawa sets out to apprehend Lupin the Third, the suspect of stealing a jewel called Cherry Sapphire.

recommendations.title: The Duel
recommendations.overview: A Texas Ranger investigates a series of unexplained deaths in a town called Helena.

recommendations.title: BMX Bandits
recommendations.overview: Teens P.J. and Goose get their thrills on BMX bikes, performing hair-raising tricks all across Sydney, Australia. Along with their new friend Judy, they discover a box of walkie-talkies -- and find out that a gang of criminals intends to use them to

recommendations.title: Penguins of Madagascar
recommendations.overview: Skipper, Kowalski, Rico and Private join forces with undercover organization The North Wind to stop the villainous Dr. Octavius Brine from destroying the world as we know it.

recommendations.title: Night of the Demons 2
recommendations.overview: Angela, the hostess from hell, summons her army of teen demons when teenagers from St. Rita's High School decide to party at the haunted Hull House on Halloween.
